statuses.verified: Directly pulled from an accepted source field in the current slate/data files.
statuses.calculated: Calculated from verified or available source fields using a documented formula.
statuses.estimated: Derived fallback. Must be clearly labeled and must not be used as if verified.
statuses.missing: No trustworthy value available. Display N/A.

iso.source: Source ISO if present; otherwise labeled fallback

xwobacon.source: Source xwOBAcon if present; otherwise labeled fallback
